name: End-to-End Payment Execution
description: Payment moves through instruction creation, compliance gate, release, settlement and status update.

name: Payment Compliance Screening
description: Sanctions, AML and restricted-party checks produce GO or NO-GO decision.

name: Market Abuse Surveillance
description: Trading activity is monitored and alerts are reviewed by compliance.

name: Settlement and Reconciliation
description: Settled movement is checked against internal payment records.

name: External Data Ingestion
description: External sources are normalised through Input Hub and made available to consumers.

name: Identity and Access Governance
description: User identities and permissions are administered and reviewed.

name: IT Incident and Request Resolution
description: Tickets are received, triaged and resolved by supporting teams.

name: EU Regulatory Oversight
description: Systems and teams are monitored against DORA and GDPR obligations.
